nodes.name: Network Security
nodes.description: Protecting the integrity, confidentiality, and accessibility of computer networks and data.

children.name: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
children.description: A system that monitors network traffic for suspicious activity and issues alerts.

children.name: Zero Trust Architecture
children.description: An IT security model that requires strict identity verification for every person and device trying to access resources.

nodes.name: Vulnerability Management
nodes.description: The cyclical practice of identifying, classifying, prioritizing, remediating, and mitigating software vulnerabilities.

children.name: CVSS Scoring
children.description: Common Vulnerability Scoring System used to assess the severity of security vulnerabilities.

nodes.name: Comparison of Encryption Standard
nodes.description: Evaluating AES, RSA, and DES for different use cases.
